{{CargoRelic
|name=Mildenhall Treasure
|class_id=22424
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=10-23
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.25%)
|description=On Oct 23, 1942 AD, the Mildenhall Treasure was rediscovered.<br>The Mildenhall Treasure was discovered accidentally by a local farmer and contains numerous Roman silverware pieces that showcase the typical styles and decorations of the Roman Empire in the 4th century AD. The Mildenhall Dish, a large silver plate with intricate carvings, is considered the most representative piece of the collection. The discovery of these silverwares is significant as it traces the history of English silverware back to ancient Roman times.
|fame=21
|art=48
|fth=29
|civ=33
|tech=23
|ss1=Per 10,000 Fervor, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG+8<br>Fervor: 500000/500000
|ss2=Per 10,000 Fervor, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG+16<br>Fervor: 500000/500000
|ss3=Per 10,000 Fervor, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG+24<br>Fervor: 500000/500000
|ss4=Per 10,000 Fervor, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG+40<br>Fervor: 500000/500000
|ss7=Per 10,000 Fervor, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG+40<br>Fervor: 500000/500000<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 400 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill I.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Snail DEF +20
}}
